creator: amir.husaini@bsdit.com
text:
Xibo is a software package which provides a high quality 
digital signage system for free! Digital signage 
is essentially any form of digital display, 
such as a TV, which is used for showing notices, 
public announcements, advertisements, etc.

WWW: http://xibo.org.uk/
